speaker: VANCE
text: This is Session Ten. You’ve come a long way to get here. You didn’t rush. You didn’t skip ahead. You stayed with the work. Today is different. Not harder. Not faster. Just complete. You’ll move through a full round. Guided the whole way. Nothing to prove. Nothing to survive. Just presence. Here is Mac.

speaker: MAC
text: Mac here. Before we start the round, we warm up. Nothing heavy. Nothing rushed. Just getting the body ready to move continuously.

speaker: MAC
text: Start in stance. Hands up. We’re easing in. Jab. Reset. After me. Set of four. Jab. Reset. One. Jab. Reset. Two. Jab. Reset. Three. Jab. Reset. Four. Again. One. Two. Three. Four. Last set. One. Two. Three. Four. And stop. Take a breath. Stay loose.

speaker: MAC
text: Before the bell, take a moment. This is the final session. You didn’t have to get here — but you did. You learned how to stand. How to move. How to protect yourself. How to respond. Whatever pace you choose in this round, you’ve earned it. Stay present. Trust the work. When the bell rings, we move together.

speaker: MAC
text: Stay with me. This is a round. Not a sprint. Hands up. Jab. Cross. Settle. Breathe. Slip. Reset. Good. Jab. Cross. Hook. Pause. Let it come back to you. Move your feet. Small steps. Breathe. Roll. Hook. Reset. Good. Jab. Pivot. Settle. Stay organised. Slip. Cross. Reset. Breathe. Uppercut. Hook. Settle. You’re managing the space now. Jab. Cross. Hook. Pause. We’re past halfway. Same pace. Same calm. Hands stay high. Eyes forward. Slip. Roll. Reset. Good. Jab. Pivot. Hook. Settle. Breathe. Uppercut. Cross. Pause. Stay smooth. We’re coming into the final moments. Ten seconds. If you feel comfortable, let the hands go. Jab. Cross. Hook. Uppercut. Hook. Finish clean. Stay balanced.

speaker: MAC
text: Let the arms hang. Breathe. That was a full round. Start to finish. You stayed with it. You stayed organised. That matters. Well done. I’m signing off.

speaker: VANCE
text: Session Ten complete. You didn’t just train today. You followed something through. That takes patience. It takes commitment. Thank you for trusting this process and for supporting the work behind it. If this helped you, and you know someone who might benefit, feel free to tell them about it. No obligation. Just a quiet recommendation. Take care of yourself. And remember what you’ve built here. This round is over. But the work stays with you.
